headline: Aptiv Delivering Production-Ready Edge AI with Long-Term Support with NVIDIA
summary: SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland, June 02, 2026--Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global industrial technology leader, today announced an expanded collaboration with NVIDIA to accelerate the adoption of production-ready edge AI. The companies are working together to evolve NVIDIA Jetson - including next generation platforms such as Jetson Thor - into commercially supported, production-ready edge AI platforms for the next generation of intelligent systems.
